review_scope: Public GET /pages endpoint and /pages web route: published-only enforcement, payload minimization, access control, web route credential handling, reserved-slug parity, URL encoding, and empty/error state safety
trigger_reason: New unauthenticated read endpoint added to a module that also contains admin write surfaces
plan_reference: plans/deferred-cleanup-plan.md — subtask-6: Public /pages index (API list endpoint + web route)

acceptance_criteria.description: List endpoint returns only published pages via shared predicate — drafts never appear
Payload contains only index fields (slug, title, updatedAt — no body)
/pages renders published list; bare /pages navigation resolves; empty state renders cleanly

findings.summary: GET /pages/:slug (PageDetail) includes createdByUserId. This is a UUID, not a username or email, and matches the blog module pattern. Low risk. Future stricter minimization is possible but out of scope for this subtask.

test_sufficiency: Sufficient — operator-pinned query tests verify status predicate and title-ASC ordering; negative tests verify draft exclusion; source-contract tests cover credentials absence, admin-endpoint absence, URL encoding, and error-state content. One minor gap (no HTTP-layer integration test for draft hiding) does not constitute a blocking finding.
documentation_accuracy: Accurate — pages.md documents GET /pages as public with PageSummary shape, status lifecycle, and reserved-slug enforcement; web-shell.md lists /pages in the route map.
